body.title: inference/sources.py: add GOOGLE_STUDIO_API_KEY and OLLAMA_API_KEY aliases
body.result: GOOGLE_STUDIO_API_KEY + OLLAMA_API_KEY aliases added; both sources now activate from credentials.cfg
body.description:
devices/inference/sources.py checks GOOGLE_AI_STUDIO_API_KEY (GoogleSource) and OLLAMA_PRO_API_KEY (OllamaCloudSource) but igor.credentials.cfg has GOOGLE_STUDIO_API_KEY and OLLAMA_API_KEY. Both free sources are marked unavailable despite keys existing.

**Affected files:** devices/inference/sources.py
**Scope boundary:** Add aliases only — check GOOGLE_STUDIO_API_KEY as fallback in GoogleSource._api_key(); check OLLAMA_API_KEY as fallback in OllamaCloudSource.
**Completion criteria:** With credentials.cfg loaded, GoogleSource.available=True and OllamaCloudSource.available=True. OR spend drops to near-zero for worker/designer tasks.
